accepted.prompt: From the hottest live Polymarket markets right now, make a bar chart of at least 8 markets comparing 24h volume versus liquidity. Use readable market titles on the x-axis, not IDs, and call out which markets look crowded versus still executable.

Inside the live 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner Polymarket event, compare Spain, France, England, Morocco, Croatia, Norway, New Zealand, and South Korea. Build a grouped bar chart with current YES probability and 24h volume by country, then explain which country is tradable versus just a headline longshot.

Inside the live What will WTI Crude Oil hit in April 2026 Polymarket event, chart the $120, $130, $140, $150, $160, $170, and $200 HIGH strike markets. Use a grouped bar chart with YES probability and 24h volume by strike level, and explain where the market curve looks most mispriced or least liquid.

Inside the live Printr public sale total commitments Polymarket event, chart at least 7 commitment thresholds as a ladder. Plot current YES probability and 24h volume by threshold, use threshold labels on the x-axis, and explain where buyers are paying for real information versus stale tails.

For the live When will Bitcoin hit $150k Polymarket event, build a deadline-curve chart across all 5 deadline markets. Plot YES probability and 24h volume by deadline date, then explain whether the curve is a real term structure or dominated by one active contract.

Build a live Polymarket sports board from at least 8 currently active sports markets. Chart each market by current YES probability and 24h volume, label the x-axis with the matchup or event name, and explain which prices look actionable rather than stale.

Build a live Polymarket crypto board from at least 8 active crypto markets. Chart current YES probability and 24h volume by market, then highlight the two markets with the strongest combination of price signal and fresh activity.
